entry.title: Video - Secretless Microsoft Authentication in Azure App Service

link.title: Video - Secretless Microsoft Authentication in Azure App Service

entry.title: Secretless Microsoft Authentication in Azure App Service

link.title: Secretless Microsoft Authentication in Azure App Service

entry.summary: Configuring Microsoft authentication for an Azure App Service is a standard security requirement for enterprise cloud applications. However, relying purely on the Azure Portal to set this up introduces hidden operational risks and brittle configuration patterns. By understanding how to decouple identity creation from infrastructure deployment, platform engineers can implement a completely secre...

entry.title: Video - AKS ACNS Walkthrough - L7 Firewalls, mTLS, and eBPF Acceleration

link.title: Video - AKS ACNS Walkthrough - L7 Firewalls, mTLS, and eBPF Acceleration

entry.title: AKS ACNS Walkthrough - L7 Firewalls, mTLS, and eBPF Acceleration

link.title: AKS ACNS Walkthrough - L7 Firewalls, mTLS, and eBPF Acceleration

entry.summary: Kubernetes networking is widely considered one of the most complex domains in modern platform engineering. While basic container network interfaces handle essential pod communication, enterprise environments demand sophisticated security boundaries, granular protocol controls, and high-performance data planes. To bridge this gap, Microsoft introduced Advanced Container Networking Services (ACNS...
